message:
refactor(db): improve S3-FIFO cache with clippy fixes and idiomatic patterns

Apply let-else guards, replace manual match arms with map_or, use
sort_by_key with Reverse, and tighten numeric casts throughout the
S3-FIFO cache implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
